# High-intent problem search

## When to use

Use when buyers search for the exact pain.

## Why it works

Capture active demand before cold persuasion.

## Mechanism

Search query reveals timing and pain.

## Required inputs

Problem keywords, pain landing page, demo proof.

## When not to use

No search volume or ambiguous intent.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

CTR, engaged sessions, demo views, trial starts.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
